instruction:
Expanding numbers in the interval (0,1) into decimal form, consider the set of all points where the digit at a specified decimal place is 4, denoted as $E$. Find the measure $m(E)$ of the set of points $E$.

Options:
A. $$
m ( E )=1 / 2 0
$$
B. $$
m ( E )=4 / 1 0
$$
C. $$
m ( E )=5 / 1 0
$$
D. $$
m ( E )=1 / 5 0
$$
E. $$
m ( E )=3 / 1 0
$$
F. $$
m ( E )=1 / 1 5
$$
G. $$
m ( E )=1 / 1 1
$$
H. $$
m ( E )=0 / 1 0
$$
I. $$
m ( E )=2 / 1 0
$$
J. $$
m ( E )=1 / 1 0
$$
